cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.3.0.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0141 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0184 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0197 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE C)
set_property(DIRECTORY PROPERTY INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "")
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "/DWIN32 /D_WINDOWS")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "/Ob0 /Od /RTC1")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "/machine:x64")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0157 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0181 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0210 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "C:/Users/shuc/Desktop/RenderEngine-OpenGL/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-17h6ou")
add_executable(cmTC_34cde)
target_sources(cmTC_34cde PRIVATE
  "C:/Program Files/CMake/share/cmake-4.3/Modules/CMakeCCompilerABI.c"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_34cde_$<UPPER_CASE:$<CONFIG>>_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_34cde>)
target_link_libraries(cmTC_34cde ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
